positioning.one_liner: Dealix is a Saudi-first AI operating system for revenue, growth, operations, trust, and client proof.
positioning.promise: Turn scattered work into pipeline, controlled automation, client proof, and recurring revenue.

product_families.name: Dealix Revenue OS
product_families.outcome: More qualified opportunities, faster follow-up, and clearer revenue control.

product_families.name: Dealix Marketing OS
product_families.outcome: Offer pages, campaigns, proof assets, and AI-visible positioning.

product_families.name: Dealix Operations OS
product_families.outcome: Visible execution rhythm, approvals, SLA tracking, and weekly reports.

product_families.name: Dealix Trust OS
product_families.outcome: Approval-first AI governance, risk control, evidence packs, and audit readiness.

product_families.name: Dealix Client Portal OS
product_families.outcome: Client-facing progress, proof rooms, documents, renewal signals, and expansion opportunities.

pricing.best_for: One focused business system shipped fast.
Full OS with governance, portals, integrations, and proof.
